Localization.Description: Creating and searching Security Definers as a potential privilege escalation element

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.id} searched for vulnerable SECURITY DEFINER functions in database {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.id} created a potentially dangerous SECURITY DEFINER function in the database {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
